key.name: show-desktop-label
key.summary: Show "Desktop" label when no window is focused
key.description: When no window has focus, display a "Desktop" label in the panel instead of an empty menu bar.

key.name: item-spacing
key.summary: Spacing between menu items in pixels
key.description: Horizontal spacing between top-level menu items in the panel.

key.name: show-status-indicator
key.summary: Show status indicator when no menu is available
key.description: Show a status indicator in the panel when the focused window has no exported menu.
